content.text: CRITICAL: SQL injection in src/api/find-user.js. The handler concatenates the untrusted req.query.name directly into the SQL string on the `const sql = ...` line, so an attacker can inject arbitrary SQL via the `name` query parameter. This is a classic SQLi / injection vulnerability. Remediation: use a parameterized query, e.g. db.raw("SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE name = ?", [name]), so the driver binds the value rather than interpolating it as SQL text.
